name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) covering access, use, support, and terms for providing a cloud (SaaS) service to a customer.

fields.label: Order Date
fields.help: The date this Order Form is entered into; the Agreement starts on this date.

fields.label: Cloud Service Description
fields.help: Description of the Cloud Service (SaaS product) being provided to Customer.

fields.label: Subscription Period
fields.help: Duration of each subscription term (e.g. '1 year starting on Order Date', '12 months').

fields.label: Non-Renewal Notice Date
fields.help: Deadline by which either party must give notice of non-renewal to prevent automatic renewal.

fields.label: Technical Support
fields.help: Level or description of technical support Provider will provide during the Subscription Period (e.g. 'Standard support during business hours', 'none').

fields.label: Use Limitations
fields.help: Any specific limitations on Customer's use of the Product beyond the standard restrictions (e.g. seat count, usage quotas, permitted use cases).

fields.label: Payment Process
fields.help: How Customer will pay Fees — by invoice or automatic charge to a payment method on file.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date the Framework Terms take effect.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.help: The jurisdiction whose law governs this Agreement (e.g. 'Delaware', 'California').

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.help: The courts where disputes must be brought (e.g. 'state and federal courts in Delaware').

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.help: The maximum total liability cap for general claims under Section 8.1(a) (e.g. fees paid in the prior 12 months).

fields.label: Increased Cap Amount
fields.help: The higher liability cap that applies specifically to Increased Claims under Section 8.1(b).

fields.label: Increased Claims
fields.help: The categories of claims subject to the Increased Cap Amount (e.g. IP infringement, data breach).

fields.label: Unlimited Claims
fields.help: Categories of claims to which the liability cap does not apply at all (e.g. fraud, willful misconduct).

fields.label: Provider Covered Claims
fields.help: Claims Provider will indemnify Customer against (e.g. third-party IP infringement claims arising from the Product).

fields.label: Customer Covered Claims
fields.help: Claims Customer will indemnify Provider against (e.g. claims arising from Customer Content or Customer's breach).

fields.label: Additional Warranties
fields.help: Any additional warranties each party must comply with beyond the standard Section 6 warranties.

fields.label: DPA (Data Processing Agreement)
fields.help: Reference to any applicable Data Processing Agreement between the parties, if any.
